channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fridge, 28th March
item.description:
Upstairs has fly-tipped fridge on pavement. Was marked as resolved. It is not, it is STILL there!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting in this lamp-post seems being shaded and does not function proper & sufficent lighting to the road and pavement underneath., 28th March
item.description:
The light bulb in the lamp-post adjoining House No. 8 Lavender Close, Bromley, BR2 9TG seems to have partly-shaded and does not provide sufficient and proper lighting for the road and pavement underneath. should be grateful if the shading element under the light bulb can be removed or light bulb replaced as appropriate. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lavender Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle occupying private space in garage, 28th March
item.description:
Vehicle check indicates it is untaxed since Aug 2025, a new V5C logbook was issued recently on 12 Mar 2026, suspected vehicle was stolen and abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warman Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on side wall to 102 Millmark Grove, SE14 6RH, 28th March
item.description:
This graffiti has been here for over a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millmark Grove, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of large, 28th March
item.description:
Boxes, black bags and furniture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked in bay for past 2 weeks., 28th March
item.description:
Illegally parked. Vehicle left abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green wheelie bin fly-tipped, 28th March
item.description:
Could you remove the green wheelie bin that's been left here for the last few months please? The oh so lovely little darlings around here keep playing with it. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harvill Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car without Reg plates parked for last 3 weeks, 28th March
item.description:
This car has been parked here for the last 3 weeks without reg plates.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wricklemarsh Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 young people just dumped furniture, 28th March
item.description:
Three young people dumped furniture on the corner of Waterdale Road and Woodbrook and then walked off down Woodbrook Road. I did speak to them politely and tell them it was illegal. This is a continual issue on this corner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking Permit Signs Vandalised on Lambourne Grove, 28th March
item.description:
The permit‑holder parking sign on [Lambourne Grove] has been spray‑painted over, completely obscuring the restriction. Non‑permit holders are now parking here because the sign cannot be read. We pay for a permit, but enforcement is being undermined. Please arrange for the sign to be cleaned or replaced. This issue has been present for at least one month (possibly longer).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Lambourne Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in play park, 28th March
item.description:
Offensive graffiti in play park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falconwood Parade, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings worn, 28th March
item.description:
The road markings around Southgate circus including the give way at exit from the Bourne and the zebra crossings on the circus have become faint.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Circus, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Appears to be a dead fox in a binbag, 28th March
item.description:
Dead animal in a binbag
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adamsrill Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Makeshift structure near Banister house, 28th March
item.description:
I would like to report a build-up of waste and a makeshift structure on a patch of grass adjacent to Banister house. Over time, various items including bed frames and other discarded materials have accumulated and now form a semi-permanent structure

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cargo bike blocking EV charging point, 28th March
item.description:
This cargo bike belongs to 80 Glenarm Road. They chain it to the lamppost outside their house. It blocks the EV charging point and it could damage any cars. This has been reported before. I am unable to charge my car when this bike is here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the street, 28th March
item.description:
We have had rubbish dumped on our street for the last 6 months. Someone has been dumping clothes, garden waste and furniture. Can you please put a warning sign to inform this is not a dumping site.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Primrose Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing cardboard rubbish, 28th March
item.description:
I work at Stoke Newington Fire Station and we got called here for an incident and noticed significant fire loading outside this property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bike on pavement, 28th March
item.description:
E-bike obstructing the footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked pavement slab, 28th March
item.description:
Cracked slab, lifted on one end which could be a trip hazard or cause if fallen upon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandhurst Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 28th March
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped to the side of my house. This keeps happening and make the street l, our house look so untidy.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): East Bank, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
